scenarios.name: Space-efficient daily snapshot backups
scenarios.rationale: Baseline created a dated backup directory but did not use --link-dest hard-linking, so snapshots were not space-efficient; treatment used --link-dest=/backups/latest, dated destination, and updated the latest symlink with ln -snf.

scenarios.name: Deploy build to prod with safe exclusions and pruning
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentioned --delete and one exclude but omitted a dry-run pass; treatment combined --delete, both --exclude patterns for node_modules and .env, and a -n dry-run step before the destructive sync.
